debug_text.text: '[XMultiplayer][Coop] our own join reached the pipe, will announce our ship once ready'
'[XMultiplayer][Coop] a session member joined, exporting our current sector'
'[XMultiplayer][Coop] player ship ready, announcing our ship now'

set_value.name: $XMP.Json
set_value.exact: '{"v":1,"type":"spawn","seq":0,"ts":' + player.age + ',"objectId":"' + player.entity.id + '"' + ',"shipType":"' + player.entity.macro.name + '"' + ',"owner":"' + player.name + '"' + ',"maxHull":' + player.entity.hullmax + ',"maxShield":' + player.entity.shieldmax + '}'

set_value.name: $XMP.CoopClasses
set_value.exact: [ table[class='station', objectType='station'], table[class='gate', objectType='gate'], table[class='asteroid', objectType='asteroidfield'], table[class='region', objectType='region'] ]

append_to_list.name: $XMP.CoopExportObjects
append_to_list.exact: table[ id=$XMP.CoopIndex.entry.id, objectType=$XMP.CoopFindObjectType, macroName=$XMP.CoopIndex.entry.macro.name, posX=$XMP.CoopIndex.entry.position.x, posY=$XMP.CoopIndex.entry.position.y, posZ=$XMP.CoopIndex.entry.position.z, rotQX=$XMP.CoopIndex.entry.quaternion.x, rotQY=$XMP.CoopIndex.entry.quaternion.y, rotQZ=$XMP.CoopIndex.entry.quaternion.z, rotQW=$XMP.CoopIndex.entry.quaternion.w ]

debug_text.text: '[XMultiplayer][Coop] sector mirror ended with a MISMATCH: received ' + $XMP.CoopReceivedObjectCount + ' of ' + $XMP.CoopExpectedObjectCount + ' expected object(s)'
